Receive triggers for donations, subscrip: 从 Ko-fi接收捐款、订阅、佣金和商店订单。
Your Ko-fi webhook verification token. F: 您的 Ko-fi webhook 验证令牌。在 Ko-fi Dashboard > 设置 > API/Webhooks > 高级设置 > Webhook 验证令牌中查找。
Triggers when a new one-time donation is: 当收到新的 Ko-fi一次性捐款时触发事件。
Triggers when a new subscription is rece: 在 Ko-fi上收到新订阅时触发事件。
Triggers when a new commission is receiv: 在 Ko-fi上收到新佣金时触发事件。
Triggers when a new shop order is receiv: 在 Ko-fi上收到新商店订单时触发事件。
To receive donation events, set up a web: To receive donation events, set up a webhook in your Ko-fi Dashboard: go to Settings > API/Webhooks, paste the URL {{webhookUrl}}, and select the "Donation" event type.
To receive subscription events, set up a: To receive subscription events, set up a webhook in your Ko-fi Dashboard: go to Settings > API/Webhooks, paste the URL {{webhookUrl}}, and select the "Subscription" event type.
To receive commission events, set up a w: To receive commission events, set up a webhook in your Ko-fi Dashboard: go to Settings > API/Webhooks, paste the URL {{webhookUrl}}, and select the "Commission" event type.
To receive shop order events, set up a w: To receive shop order events, set up a webhook in your Ko-fi Dashboard: go to Settings > API/Webhooks, paste the URL {{webhookUrl}}, and select the "Shop Order" event type.
